hypothesis: Combining EMA, OBV and Aroon with Bollinger Bands, Donchian Channels, Stochastic RSI and a stop-loss/take-profit strategy improves the momentum signals on Bitcoin USD pair in one hour timeframe.

Combining the momentum of EMA, the volume related information of OBV, and the relative strength of Stochastic RSI with trend filtering ability of Donchian bands will lead to better results in identifying high-momentum assets.
